main.description: Create a block (ban) on behalf of a streamer. Requires 'ban' permission. Creates an app.bsky.graph.block record in the streamer's repository.

streamer.description: The DID of the streamer whose chat this block applies to.

subject.description: The DID of the user being blocked from chat.

uri.description: The AT-URI of the created block record.

cid.description: The CID of the created block record.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.description: The request lacks valid authentication credentials.

errors.name: Forbidden
errors.description: The caller does not have permission to create blocks for this streamer.

errors.name: SessionNotFound
errors.description: The streamer's OAuth session could not be found or is invalid.
